C1.descriptionTemplate:
"24" Obtain [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}:
{Chaos}: The Crit. Rate and Crit. DMG of "24" +[StateArg4]%. Each time a Posse is used, the Exalt DMG of "24" +[StateArg1].
{Aequor}: The DMG "24" deals enjoys a [StateArg2]% {Tentacle DMG} bonus and inflicts {Poison} equal to 10% of DMG dealt. "24"'s Exalt can trigger 50% {Poison} on enemies.
{Caro}: For every 1 Arithmetica "24" consumes, {Embryo Fusion} +5%, "24" gains [StateArg3] {STR}.
{Ultra}: The DMG "24" deals enjoys a [StateArg5]% {Counter} DMG Bonus. Shuffle 1 {Insight} into the Discard Pile at turn end, Hand Limit +2.

C2.descriptionTemplate:
Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG. "24" obtains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus.
Depressed Persona: Gain an additional 5 Aliemus. Manic Persona: Deal 1 additional instance of DMG.

C3.descriptionTemplate:
Obtain [Block:Arg1] Shield. "24" Obtain [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus.
Depressed Persona: Gain an additional 5 Aliemus. Manic Persona: Gain 1 additional instance of Shield.

C4.descriptionTemplate:
Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG to all enemies. "24" obtains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus.
Depressed Persona: Also grants other Awakeners the same amount of Aliemus. Manic Persona: The amount of Aliemus gained is tripled

C5.descriptionTemplate:
Randomly deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG [Arg2] times.
Depressed Persona: Reduces the Arithmetica Cost of the card with the highest cost in your hand by 1, and obtain Temporary {Retain}. Manic Persona: DMG instances +2

Exalt.descriptionTemplate:
Deal [Damage:Arg1] {Pierce DMG}, increasing the Base DMG of {Twisted Carrion Revel} by 20% for this battle,
"24" switches between Depressed and Manic Personas. Trigger additional effects based on the current Realm and Persona

OverExalt.descriptionTemplate: Obtain 24 Realm Mastery. The next Command Card of "24" will be effective 3 times.

T2.descriptionTemplate: Obtain [Arg1] Aliemus after the start of exploration.

T3.descriptionTemplate:
This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF are increased by [Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
Base DMG caused by "24" increases by [Arg3]%, and Final DMG to "Sculptors' Association" enemies increases by [Arg4]%.

E1.descriptionTemplate: {Frenzied Slash} increases Base DMG by 33%. While in Depressed Persona, the Arithmetica Cost of corresponding Cards is reduced by an additional 1; while in Manic Persona, the number of hits is increased by an additional 1.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate:
Randomly deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG [Arg2] times.
Depressed Persona: Reduce the Arithmetica Cost of the highest-cost card in hand by 2 and gain Temporary {Retain}. Manic Persona: Deal 3 additional instances of DMG.

E2.descriptionTemplate: {Symbiotic Aberration} generates 2 more Aliemus. In Depressed state, inflict {Weakness} on all enemies for 1 turn; in Manic state, inflict {Vulnerable} on all enemies for 1 turn.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate:
Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG to all enemies. "24" obtains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus.
Depressed Persona: Other Awakeners also obtain the same amount of Aliemus, and all enemies gain {Weakness} for 1 turn. Manic Persona: Triple the Aliemus gained, and all enemies gain {Vulnerable} for 1 turn.

E3.descriptionTemplate: At turn end, "24" obtains 10 Aliemus. Each time "24" releases Exalt, the Aliemus obtained from this effect in battle increases by 1.
